entities.name: the fractured pattern
entities.description: An alien, geometric pattern within the man that is currently dissolving and losing its synchronized pulse.

entities.name: the green luminescence
entities.description: The visual manifestation of the alien pattern within the man, which flickers erratically and fades into his healing flesh.

entities.name: the thawing landscape
entities.description: The environment outside where the player character looks out after the healing process concludes.

entities.name: the fractured pattern
entities.description: A chaotic, incomplete manifestation of the alien pattern within the man that is currently hesitating and fraying.

entities.name: the green luminescence
entities.description: The erratic, flickering light emitted by the alien pattern within the man as it dissolves.

entities.name: the thawing landscape
entities.description: The environment outside the settlement where the snow is melting and the thaw is becoming visible.

entities.name: the fractured pattern
entities.description: A chaotic, incomplete echo of a former precise and malevolent alien pattern within the man, currently undergoing dissolution.

entities.name: the method
entities.description: The current approach to healing the man, which has shifted from cutting the leading edge to preventing the pattern from becoming whole again.

entities.name: the green luminescence
entities.description: The erratic, flickering light within the man that previously pulsed in a synchronized rhythm but is now fading into dull, dead spots.

entities.name: the clearing
entities.description: The thawing landscape where the man is being healed and the battle against the pattern has ended, described as a place where one does not trample what is already falling.
